name: Warm Cherry Tomato Salad
recipeIngredient: 4 cups assorted cherry tomatoes, some halved
freshly ground black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large non-stick skillet, heat vinegar, oil, and garlic over moderate heat until just simmering.
2. Add tomatoes, pepper, and salt to taste and cook, tossing, until slightly tender and heated through, 1 to 2 minutes.
3. Toss tomatoes with chopped rosemary and garnish with rosemary sprigs.
